synthesis.driver: Fragile US-Iran ceasefire keeps war premium alive, lifting Brent slightly despite oversupply cap.
synthesis.based_on: Iran War Looms Over NATO Summit

takes.iran war looms over nato summit: Ceasefire risks sustain war premium, but oversupply limits upward price movement.
takes.opec allies hike output again as hormuz: Rising output and recovering Hormuz traffic cap potential price spikes.
takes.opec approves further oil output increas: OPEC+ output hike reinforces oversupply, countering upward pressure from Hormuz tensions.
takes.middle east oil producers face export hu: Export hurdles ease as Hormuz flows recover, limiting price upside.
takes.govt withdraws emergency gas supply curb: Resumed LNG shipments signal easing disruptions, pressuring prices downward.
